review_triggers: product surface promotion to standalone public status
canonical domain or public machine-readable record change

supported_readings: PHAROS describes its public services, methods, and review posture.
The website discloses accountable human review, route boundaries, and review dates.
The readiness tool is a calibration aid and not a certification.
non_claims: The site is not legal advice.
The site is not a certification packet or audit opinion.
Website copy alone does not prove deployment-specific compliance.
AI-assisted drafting does not upgrade unsupported claims into supported claims.

ai_assistance_disclosure.statement: Generative AI may be used for structural drafting and language revision on this public site. It is not treated as an evidentiary authority. Source selection, claim boundaries, review dates, and final publication judgment remain under human control.

auditability_controls.trigger: Material public claim, route, or public product posture change
auditability_controls.review_interval: On material change and at scheduled assurance review

auditability_controls.trigger: External review of method, references, or readiness posture
auditability_controls.review_interval: Whenever public routes or public explanations change

auditability_controls.trigger: Any proposed expansion of public marketing or assurance language
auditability_controls.review_interval: Before publication of material claim changes

auditability_controls.trigger: Claim, route, domain, or product-surface status change

evidence_surfaces.purpose: External frameworks, law, and documentation references
Bounded answers about scope, evidence, and engagements
Human escalation path for deployment-specific review

change_log.change: Promoted /portal/compassai/aurora as the canonical Aurora browser route and kept /portal/aurorai as a compatibility redirect.
Normalized the public contact address to pharos@pharos-ai.ca across the homepage shell and shared contact surfaces.
Added route-specific static HTML output and rewrites so core public pages remain legible without JavaScript.
Strengthened the public assurance surface with explicit auditability controls and alias routes for assurance review.
Updated the transparency record with accountable location, jurisdictional root, control entries, and change history.
Linked the homepage review section more directly to the public assurance surface.
